Name: Average time spent in Accepted + Wait - User across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Total duration of Accepted + Wait - User when followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time spent in Accepted + Wait - User before transitioning to Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait - User to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total elapsed time between the start of Accepted + Wait - User and the end of Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Wait - User in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum duration of Accepted + Wait - User in cases that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Average time spent in Accepted + Wait - User compared to time spent in Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time from the end of Accepted + In Progress to the start of Accepted + Wait - User, and then to Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + Resolved when Completed + In Call does not occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User in variants that transition directly to Completed + In Call versus those that go through additional intermediate activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from the completion of Accepted + Wait - User to the initiation of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait - User in high-impact cases (impact = 'High') that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case grouped by the last value of impact filtered by the function ma == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Name: Duration of Accepted + Wait - User when preceded by Queued + Awaiting Assignment and followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User across all cases that include Completed + In Call, grouped by country
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs
